basics.name: Atsushi Ueda
basics.label: Theoretical Physicist
basics.summary: FWO junior postdoctoral fellow working on tensor networks, critical phenomena, and quantum field theory.

work.name: FWO / Ghent University
work.summary: Hosted by the Department of Physics and Astronomy at Ghent University.
highlights: Research on tensor-network methods, critical phenomena, and universal physics in quantum many-body systems.

work.name: Ghent University
highlights: Worked on tensor-network algorithms, finite-size and finite-entanglement scaling, and lattice and topological systems.

courses: Doctoral research in theoretical physics and tensor-network methods.

awards.title: The School of Science Encouragement Award (Doctoral Program)

publications.name: Chiral edge states emerging on anyon-net
Self-congruent point in critical matrix product states: An effective field theory for finite-entanglement scaling
Finite-size scaling on the torus with periodic projected entangled-pair states
Finite-size corrections to the energy spectra of gapless one-dimensional systems in the presence of boundaries
